title: Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Chennai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd!
